response.step_by_step_log: I identified the three songs based on the text appearing in the top-left corner of the screen during each segment: '夢見る空へ', 'We are GAMERS!!!!', and 'Mogu Mogu YUMMY!'. I performed web searches for each song title along with the term 'lyrics' and identified the original artists and performers. Lyrics and English translations were obtained from reputable lyric websites.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley performed by different Hololive groups. The first song, 'Yume Miru Sora e', is performed by Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, and Shiranui Flare. The second song, 'We are GAMERS!!!!', is performed by the Hololive Gamers unit. The final song, 'Mogu Mogu YUMMY!', is a performance by Nekomata Okayu.

scenes.description: Hololive members Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, and Shiranui Flare perform the song 'Yume Miru Sora e'. The title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Shiranui Flare
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
重ねた手はギュッと 離さずに
行くよ！（行こう！）夢見る空へ
窓越しに見上げた とても小さな空
ここで出会えたのは 数え切れないキセキ
繰り返した一歩が キラメキをつないで
星のような笑顔 導いた
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hold hands together tightly, don't let go, let's go! (Let's go!) Towards the sky of our dreams
Looking up through the window, at the very small sky
What we met here is an countless number of miracles
Each step repeated, connected the sparkles
And led us to a smile like a star

scenes.description: Hololive Gamers (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone) perform the song 'We are GAMERS!!!!'. The title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
4人で集まればGAMERS ultimate
参加してBダッシュ
レベル上げで目指せクリア
今日は何を遊ぶ？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Together, the four of us are the GAMERS ultimate
Join us and hit the B dash
Up our levels aiming to clear
What will we play today?

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu performs her original song 'Mogu Mogu YUMMY!'. The title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
森羅万象の悪戦苦闘も
マヨネーズかけたら大体おいしくなる？
君が泣いても お腹は空くよ
消化できなかった 「ごめんごめん。」
酸いも甘いも 勝手に食べて
ご迷惑おかけしています
パクチーな掟 変な味のジュース
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even the struggles of the universe
If you put mayonnaise on them, do they generally become delicious?
Even if you cry, you'll get hungry
'Sorry, sorry' that couldn't be digested
Eating both the bitter and the sweet on my own
I'm causing you trouble
A coriander rule, strange-tasting juice
